title: q2m3: A Hybrid Quantum-Classical Framework for QM/MM Simulations
description: q2m3 is a hybrid quantum-classical QM/MM proof-of-concept framework for coupling PySCF, PennyLane Quantum Phase Estimation (QPE), and explicit MM point-charge environments in a single Python package. It targets Early Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computers (EFTQC) and provides compile-once / run-many solvation experiments, fixed-MO one-electron embedding, and EFTQC resource estimation for active-space Hamiltonians.
